hexagrams.judgment: The Creative works sublime success, furthering through perseverance.
hexagrams.image: The movement of heaven is full of power. The superior man makes himself strong and untiring.

hexagrams.judgment: The Receptive brings about sublime success, furthering through the perseverance of a mare.
hexagrams.image: The earth's condition is receptive devotion. The superior man carries the outer world.

hexagrams.judgment: Difficulty at the Beginning works supreme success, furthering through perseverance.
hexagrams.image: Clouds and thunder: Difficulty at the Beginning. The superior man brings order out of confusion.

hexagrams.judgment: Youthful Folly has success. It is not I who seek the young fool; the young fool seeks me.
hexagrams.image: A spring wells up at the foot of the mountain: Youth. The superior man fosters his character.

hexagrams.judgment: Waiting. If you are sincere, you have light and success. Perseverance brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Clouds rise up to heaven: Waiting. The superior man eats and drinks, is joyous and of good cheer.

hexagrams.judgment: Conflict. You are sincere and are being obstructed. A cautious halt halfway brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Heaven and water go their opposite ways: Conflict. The superior man carefully considers the beginning.

hexagrams.judgment: The Army needs perseverance and a strong man. Good fortune without blame.
hexagrams.image: In the middle of the earth is water: the Army. The superior man increases his masses by generosity.

hexagrams.judgment: Holding Together brings good fortune. Inquire of the oracle once again whether you possess sublimity.
hexagrams.image: On the earth is water: Holding Together. The kings of antiquity bestowed the different states as fiefs.

hexagrams.judgment: Small Taming has success. Dense clouds, no rain from our western region.
hexagrams.image: The wind drives across heaven: Small Taming. The superior man refines the outward aspect of his nature.

hexagrams.judgment: Treading upon the tail of the tiger. It does not bite the man. Success.
hexagrams.image: Heaven above, the lake below: Treading. The superior man discriminates between high and low.

hexagrams.judgment: Peace. The small departs, the great approaches. Good fortune. Success.
hexagrams.image: Heaven and earth unite: Peace. The ruler divides and completes the course of heaven and earth.

hexagrams.judgment: Standstill. Evil people do not further the perseverance of the superior man. The great departs; the small approaches.
hexagrams.image: Heaven and earth do not unite: Standstill. The superior man falls back upon his inner worth.

hexagrams.judgment: Fellowship with Men in the open. Success. It furthers one to cross the great water.
hexagrams.image: Heaven together with fire: Fellowship. The superior man organizes the clans and makes distinctions.

hexagrams.judgment: Possession in Great Measure — supreme success.
hexagrams.image: Fire in heaven above: Great Possession. The superior man curbs evil and furthers good.

hexagrams.judgment: Modesty creates success. The superior man carries things through.
hexagrams.image: Within the earth, a mountain: Modesty. The superior man reduces that which is too much.

hexagrams.judgment: Enthusiasm. It furthers one to install helpers and to set armies marching.
hexagrams.image: Thunder comes resounding out of the earth: Enthusiasm. The ancient kings made music to honor merit.

hexagrams.judgment: Following has supreme success. Perseverance furthers. No blame.
hexagrams.image: Thunder in the middle of the lake: Following. The superior man at nightfall goes indoors for rest.

hexagrams.name_en: Work on What Has Been Spoiled
hexagrams.judgment: Work on what has been spoiled has supreme success. It furthers one to cross the great water.
hexagrams.image: The wind blows low on the mountain: Decay. The superior man stirs up the people and strengthens their spirit.

hexagrams.judgment: Approach has supreme success. Perseverance furthers. When the eighth month comes, there will be misfortune.
hexagrams.image: The earth above the lake: Approach. The superior man is inexhaustible in his will to teach.

hexagrams.judgment: Contemplation. The ablution has been made, but not yet the offering.
hexagrams.image: The wind blows over the earth: Contemplation. The ancient kings visited the regions of the world.

hexagrams.judgment: Biting Through has success. It is favorable to let justice be administered.
hexagrams.image: Thunder and lightning: Biting Through. The kings of antiquity made firm the laws through clearly defined penalties.

hexagrams.judgment: Grace has success. In small matters it is favorable to undertake something.
hexagrams.image: Fire at the foot of the mountain: Grace. The superior man proceeds with clarity in affairs of daily life.

hexagrams.judgment: Splitting Apart. It does not further one to go anywhere.
hexagrams.image: The mountain rests on the earth: Splitting Apart. Those above can ensure their position only by giving generously to those below.

hexagrams.judgment: Return. Success. Going out and coming in without error. Friends come without blame.
hexagrams.image: Thunder within the earth: the Turning Point. The kings of antiquity closed the passes at the time of solstice.

hexagrams.judgment: Innocence. Supreme success. Perseverance furthers. If someone is not as he should be, he has misfortune.
hexagrams.image: Under heaven thunder rolls: all things attain the natural state of innocence. The kings of old nourished all beings.

hexagrams.name_en: The Taming Power of the Great
hexagrams.judgment: The Taming Power of the Great. Perseverance furthers. Not eating at home brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Heaven within the mountain: the Great Taming Power. The superior man acquaints himself with many sayings of antiquity.

hexagrams.judgment: The Corners of the Mouth. Perseverance brings good fortune. Pay heed to the providing of nourishment.
hexagrams.image: At the foot of the mountain, thunder: providing nourishment. The superior man is careful of his words.

hexagrams.judgment: Preponderance of the Great. The ridgepole sags to the breaking point. It furthers one to have somewhere to go.
hexagrams.image: The lake rises above the trees: Preponderance of the Great. The superior man does not feel distress when he stands alone.

hexagrams.judgment: The Abysmal repeated. If you are sincere, you have success in your heart, and whatever you do succeeds.
hexagrams.image: Water flows on uninterruptedly and reaches its goal: the Abysmal. The superior man walks in lasting virtue.

hexagrams.judgment: The Clinging. Perseverance furthers. It brings success. Care of the cow brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: That which is bright rises twice: the Clinging. The great man continues to illuminate the four quarters.

hexagrams.judgment: Influence. Success. Perseverance furthers. To take a maiden to wife brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: A lake on the mountain: Influence. The superior man encourages people to approach him by his readiness.

hexagrams.judgment: Duration. Success. No blame. Perseverance furthers. It furthers one to have somewhere to go.
hexagrams.image: Thunder and wind: Duration. The superior man stands firm and does not change his direction.

hexagrams.judgment: Retreat. Success. In what is small, perseverance furthers.
hexagrams.image: Mountain under heaven: Retreat. The superior man keeps the inferior man at a distance.

hexagrams.judgment: The Power of the Great. Perseverance furthers.
hexagrams.image: Thunder in heaven above: the Power of the Great. The superior man does not tread upon paths that do not accord with established order.

hexagrams.judgment: Progress. The powerful prince is honored with horses in large numbers. In a single day he is granted audience three times.
hexagrams.image: The sun rises over the earth: Progress. The superior man brightens his bright virtue.

hexagrams.judgment: Darkening of the Light. In adversity it furthers one to be persevering.
hexagrams.image: The light has sunk into the earth: Darkening of the Light. The superior man lives with the great mass of men.

hexagrams.judgment: The Family. The perseverance of the woman furthers.
hexagrams.image: Wind comes forth from fire: the Family. The superior man has substance in his words and duration in his way of life.

hexagrams.judgment: Opposition. In small matters, good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Above, fire; below, the lake: Opposition. The superior man retains his individuality.

hexagrams.judgment: Obstruction. The southwest furthers. The northeast does not further. It furthers one to see the great man. Perseverance brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Water on the mountain: Obstruction. The superior man turns his attention to himself and molds his character.

hexagrams.judgment: Deliverance. The southwest furthers. If there is no longer anything where one has to go, return brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Thunder and rain set in: Deliverance. The superior man pardons mistakes and forgives misdeeds.

hexagrams.judgment: Decrease combined with sincerity brings about supreme good fortune without blame.
hexagrams.image: At the foot of the mountain, the lake: Decrease. The superior man controls his anger and restrains his instincts.

hexagrams.judgment: Increase. It furthers one to undertake something. It furthers one to cross the great water.
hexagrams.image: Wind and thunder: Increase. The superior man sees good and imitates it; has faults and rids himself of them.

hexagrams.judgment: Breakthrough. One must resolutely make the matter known at the court of the king. It must be announced truthfully.
hexagrams.image: The lake has risen up to heaven: Breakthrough. The superior man does not hoard. He dispenses riches downward.

hexagrams.judgment: Coming to Meet. The maiden is powerful. One should not marry such a maiden.
hexagrams.image: Under heaven, wind: Coming to Meet. The prince acts when he promulgates his commands.

hexagrams.judgment: Gathering Together. Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers one to see the great man.
hexagrams.image: Over the earth, the lake: Gathering Together. The superior man renews his weapons to meet the unforeseen.

hexagrams.judgment: Pushing Upward has supreme success. One must see the great man. Do not be afraid. Departure to the south brings good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Within the earth, wood grows: Pushing Upward. The superior man of devoted character heaps up small things.

hexagrams.judgment: Oppression. Success. Perseverance. The great man brings about good fortune.
hexagrams.image: There is no water in the lake: Exhaustion. The superior man stakes his life on following his will.

hexagrams.judgment: The Well. The town may be changed, but the well cannot be changed. It neither decreases nor increases.
hexagrams.image: Water over wood: the Well. The superior man encourages the people at their work.

hexagrams.judgment: Revolution. On your own day you are believed. Supreme success, furthering through perseverance.
hexagrams.image: Fire in the lake: Revolution. The superior man sets the calendar in order.

hexagrams.judgment: The Cauldron. Supreme good fortune. Success.
hexagrams.image: Fire over wood: the Cauldron. The superior man consolidates his fate by making his position correct.

hexagrams.judgment: Shock brings success. Shock comes—oh, oh! Laughing words—ha, ha! The shock terrifies for a hundred miles.
hexagrams.image: Thunder repeated: Shock. The superior man in fear and trembling sets his life in order.

hexagrams.judgment: Keeping Still. Keeping his back still so that he no longer feels his body. He goes into his courtyard.
hexagrams.image: Mountains standing close together: Keeping Still. The superior man does not permit his thoughts to go beyond his situation.

hexagrams.judgment: Development. The maiden is given in marriage. Good fortune. Perseverance furthers.
hexagrams.image: On the mountain, a tree: Development. The superior man abides in dignity and virtue, in order to improve the mores.

hexagrams.judgment: The Marrying Maiden. Undertakings bring misfortune. Nothing that would further.
hexagrams.image: Thunder over the lake: the Marrying Maiden. The superior man understands the transitory in the light of the eternity of the end.

hexagrams.judgment: Abundance has success. The king attains abundance. Be not sad. Be like the sun at midday.
hexagrams.image: Both thunder and lightning come: Abundance. The superior man decides lawsuits and carries out punishments.

hexagrams.judgment: The Wanderer. Success through smallness. Perseverance brings good fortune to the wanderer.
hexagrams.image: Fire on the mountain: the Wanderer. The superior man is clear-minded and cautious in imposing penalties.

hexagrams.judgment: The Gentle. Success through what is small. It furthers one to have somewhere to go. It furthers one to see the great man.
hexagrams.image: Winds following one upon the other: the Gentle. The superior man repeats his orders and carries out his undertakings.

hexagrams.judgment: The Joyous. Success. Perseverance is favorable.
hexagrams.image: Lakes resting one on the other: the Joyous. The superior man joins with his friends for discussion and practice.

hexagrams.judgment: Dispersion. Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers one to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.
hexagrams.image: The wind drives over the water: Dispersion. The kings of old sacrificed to the Lord and built temples.

hexagrams.judgment: Limitation. Success. Galling limitation must not be persevered in.
hexagrams.image: Water over lake: Limitation. The superior man creates number and measure, and examines the nature of virtue and correct conduct.

hexagrams.judgment: Inner Truth. Pigs and fishes. Good fortune. It furthers one to cross the great water. Perseverance furthers.
hexagrams.image: Wind over lake: Inner Truth. The superior man discusses criminal cases in order to delay executions.

hexagrams.judgment: Preponderance of the Small. Success. Perseverance furthers. Small things may be done; great things should not be done.
hexagrams.image: Thunder on the mountain: Preponderance of the Small. The superior man gives preponderance to devotion in his conduct.

hexagrams.judgment: After Completion. Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. At the beginning good fortune, at the end disorder.
hexagrams.image: Water over fire: After Completion. The superior man takes thought of misfortune and arms himself against it in advance.

hexagrams.judgment: Before Completion. Success. But if the little fox, after nearly completing the crossing, gets his tail in the water, there is no good fortune.
hexagrams.image: Fire over water: Before Completion. The superior man is careful in the differentiation of things.

encoding_note: binary: 6-bit integer, bit 0 = bottom line (line 1), bit 5 = top line (line 6). Trigram values: Heaven=7, Earth=0, Thunder=1, Water=2, Mountain=4, Wind=6, Fire=5, Lake=3. Nuclear: lower_nuclear=(binary>>1)&7, upper_nuclear=(binary>>2)&7.
